summary: ARI Push Engine P1 Implementation - Full Test Complete. All 30 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend ARI Push Dashboard at /ari-push fully functional with 6 metric cards, 4 tabs, Push Pending/Refresh buttons, buffer status indicator, and provider adapter badges (hotelrunner, exely). Both providers running in DRY-RUN mode.
critical_code_review_comments: router.py: All 12 endpoints properly implemented with correct HTTP methods and query params
buffer.py: In-memory event buffer with per-event-type debounce windows (2s availability, 5s rate, 3s restriction)
coalescer.py: Proper date range merging and restriction precedence (close > open)
delta_compiler.py: Provider-specific compilation (HotelRunner REST params, Exely SOAP periods)
outbound_service.py: Complete push orchestration with idempotency check, rate limiting, ack handling
repositories.py: Clean MongoDB operations with _id exclusion, proper indexing setup in startup.py
ARIPushDashboard.jsx: Well-structured React component with data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Both adapters (hotelrunner_ari_adapter.py, exely_ari_adapter.py) in DRY-RUN mode - no real provider credentials
seed_data_creation: Test events created with TEST_ prefix room_type_codes (TEST_STD, TEST_DLX, TEST_COALESCE, TEST_IDEMPOTENT, TEST_DRYRUN)
context_for_next_testing_agent: ARI Push Engine fully tested. tenant_id=044f122b-87b5-480a-88b4-b9534b0c8c90, property_id=prop-001. Buffer is in-memory with debounce windows. Both HotelRunner and Exely adapters registered and in DRY-RUN mode. All 12 API endpoints working. Frontend dashboard at /ari-push has 6 metrics, 4 tabs (Queue Monitor, Outbound Logs, Drift, Events), Push Pending and Refresh buttons.

backend_api_tests: TestEngineStats: engine_stats_endpoint_accessible, hotelrunner_adapter_registered, exely_adapter_registered, buffer_state_visible - ALL PASSED
TestEventPublishing: publish_availability_event, publish_rate_event, publish_restriction_event, publish_event_returns_coalescing_key_format - ALL PASSED
TestEventListing: list_events_returns_array, list_events_with_type_filter, list_events_pagination - ALL PASSED
TestChangeSets: list_change_sets_returns_array, list_change_sets_with_status_filter, list_change_sets_with_provider_filter, change_set_fields_present - ALL PASSED
TestPushOperations: push_pending_endpoint, push_pending_with_provider_filter, force_push_nonexistent_change_set - ALL PASSED
TestDrift: list_drift_states, drift_check_endpoint, drift_reconcile_endpoint - ALL PASSED
frontend_tests: 6 Metric cards (Total Events, Pending, Acked, Failed, Drift, Outbound) - ALL FOUND
4 Tabs (Queue Monitor, Outbound Logs, Drift, Events) - ALL FOUND AND CLICKABLE
Push Pending button - FOUND AND CLICKABLE (shows toast: 'Pushed: 1, Skipped: 0, Failed: 0')
Provider adapter badges (hotelrunner, exely) - BOTH FOUND
Change Sets table - FOUND with data rows
Outbound Logs table - FOUND with 9 entries (all status 200)
Events table - FOUND with test events

mocked_apis_note: MOCKED: Both HotelRunner and Exely provider adapters are in DRY-RUN mode. Push operations return success with dry_run: true. No real provider credentials configured.
